column3: The hotel offers a **flexible** cancellation policy for guests.
Each **guestroom** features a balcony and ocean view.
Kids love the **gameroom** on the second floor.
The resort has a **creche** for toddlers, fully supervised.
The curtains are woven from luxury **jacquard** fabric.
Heavy **brocade** drapes hang in the grand ballroom.
White **damask** tablecloths cover the dining tables.
A soft **chenille** throw lay across the bed.
The sheets are made of premium **pima** cotton.
Crisp **percale** bedding gives a hotel-quality feel.
A **quilted** bedspread covered the king-size mattress.

A knitted **afghan** was folded at the bed's foot.

This **nonrefundable** booking saves twenty percent, note that.
